## Meeting Purpose

[Demonstrate and discuss the DataGrid article generation process using ATLAS, addressing issues and updates.](https://fathom.video/share/_TWhqBme5BVRiD6GnyYKC_7u-dnWAT6g?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [DataGrid articles don't require the full SOP; aim for 30-minute completion time per article](https://fathom.video/share/_TWhqBme5BVRiD6GnyYKC_7u-dnWAT6g?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [ATLAS is experiencing various technical issues (e.g., automatic execution toggle, internal linking)](https://fathom.video/share/_TWhqBme5BVRiD6GnyYKC_7u-dnWAT6g?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Template updates needed for more efficient article generation](https://fathom.video/share/_TWhqBme5BVRiD6GnyYKC_7u-dnWAT6g?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
  - [Strapi article process discussed; limited to 8 articles initially](https://fathom.video/share/_TWhqBme5BVRiD6GnyYKC_7u-dnWAT6g?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

## Topics

### ATLAS Technical Issues

  - [Automatic execution toggle not working consistently](https://fathom.video/share/_TWhqBme5BVRiD6GnyYKC_7u-dnWAT6g?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Internal linking feature currently non-functional](https://fathom.video/share/_TWhqBme5BVRiD6GnyYKC_7u-dnWAT6g?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)
  - [Various UI and functionality glitches (e.g., save buttons missing, formatting issues)](https://fathom.video/share/_TWhqBme5BVRiD6GnyYKC_7u-dnWAT6g?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Nika to raise Linear tickets for ongoing problems](https://fathom.video/share/_TWhqBme5BVRiD6GnyYKC_7u-dnWAT6g?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)

### DataGrid Article Generation Process

  - [Use pop art style for images, 16:9 aspect ratio](https://fathom.video/share/_TWhqBme5BVRiD6GnyYKC_7u-dnWAT6g?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
  - [Copy outline template from Google Docs into assignment brief](https://fathom.video/share/_TWhqBme5BVRiD6GnyYKC_7u-dnWAT6g?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)
  - [Focus on key sections: definition, importance, common time sinks](https://fathom.video/share/_TWhqBme5BVRiD6GnyYKC_7u-dnWAT6g?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [Minimal editing required; aim for efficiency over perfection](https://fathom.video/share/_TWhqBme5BVRiD6GnyYKC_7u-dnWAT6g?tab=summary&timestamp=1819.0)
  - [Fact-checking process demonstrated; watch for bogus stats](https://fathom.video/share/_TWhqBme5BVRiD6GnyYKC_7u-dnWAT6g?tab=summary&timestamp=1843.0)

### Template and Process Updates

  - [Current templates to be used for the next 2 weeks (11 articles remaining)](https://fathom.video/share/_TWhqBme5BVRiD6GnyYKC_7u-dnWAT6g?tab=summary&timestamp=2539.0)
  - [New templates will include copyable assignment briefs for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/_TWhqBme5BVRiD6GnyYKC_7u-dnWAT6g?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)
  - [Vivek to update templates for the next batch of articles](https://fathom.video/share/_TWhqBme5BVRiD6GnyYKC_7u-dnWAT6g?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

### Strapi Article Process

  - [Generate articles and create threads in internal Strapi channel](https://fathom.video/share/_TWhqBme5BVRiD6GnyYKC_7u-dnWAT6g?tab=summary&timestamp=2594.0)
  - [Link Google Doc drafts in thread comments](https://fathom.video/share/_TWhqBme5BVRiD6GnyYKC_7u-dnWAT6g?tab=summary&timestamp=2600.0)
  - [Vivek to review and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/_TWhqBme5BVRiD6GnyYKC_7u-dnWAT6g?tab=summary&timestamp=2587.0)
  - [Limited to 8 articles initially](https://fathom.video/share/_TWhqBme5BVRiD6GnyYKC_7u-dnWAT6g?tab=summary&timestamp=2677.0)

### RAMP Project Update

  - [Content creation and web hosting charts pending](https://fathom.video/share/_TWhqBme5BVRiD6GnyYKC_7u-dnWAT6g?tab=summary&timestamp=2206.0)
  - [Victoria to provide data wrappers, expected completion by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/_TWhqBme5BVRiD6GnyYKC_7u-dnWAT6g?tab=summary&timestamp=2214.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Timmy to generate DataGrid articles using the demonstrated process](https://fathom.video/share/_TWhqBme5BVRiD6GnyYKC_7u-dnWAT6g?tab=summary&timestamp=2691.0)
  - [Nika to raise Linear tickets for ATLAS issues](https://fathom.video/share/_TWhqBme5BVRiD6GnyYKC_7u-dnWAT6g?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [Vivek to update templates for the next batch of articles](https://fathom.video/share/_TWhqBme5BVRiD6GnyYKC_7u-dnWAT6g?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Team to monitor and adapt to ATLAS updates and fixes](https://fathom.video/share/_TWhqBme5BVRiD6GnyYKC_7u-dnWAT6g?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
  - [Timmy to begin Strapi article generation, creating threads for review](https://fathom.video/share/_TWhqBme5BVRiD6GnyYKC_7u-dnWAT6g?tab=summary&timestamp=2705.0)
